name: Pepper Lemon Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 vegetable broth or chicken stock (for non-vegetarians)
1 bunch greens (Swiss Chard, Escarole, or Broccoli-Rabe)
1 can white Cannellini beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cook the sliced peppers in broth for 8-10 minutes until tender.
2. Add greens, minced garlic, lemon slices, and salt to taste. Cook for an additional 5-8 minutes or until the greens are wilted.
3. Stir in the drained white beans and their liquid.
4. Add the chopped fresh pepper and cook for another minute.
5. Drain the pasta and add it to the pot with the sauce. Mix well and serve.
